title: RFP: MES for Discrete Manufacturing
raw:
RFP: MES for Discrete Manufacturing

Company: Fabrikam Components
Submission deadline: 2026-05-01
Timeline: 5 months (pilot) + rollout

Scope:
- Implement MES for production line: OEE, traceability, lot genealogy
- Integrate with PLCs, ERP (SAP S/4)

Must-have:
- Real-time data capture, historian, reports for quality

Nice-to-have:
- Advanced scheduling optimization

Evaluation Criteria:
- Fixed-price pilot, experience with PLC integration

Compliance: Data residency local, ISO 9001
